id.description: The unique identifier for the saved reply.

appId.description: The ID of the app this saved reply is scoped to, if any.

title.description: Display title of the saved reply.

handle.description: URL-safe handle for the saved reply, unique per organization. Auto-derived from `title` when not supplied. On delete the handle is suffixed with `_deleted_<id>` to free the slot.

content.description: Body of the saved reply, typically a TipTap JSON document. Free-form JSON object.

defaultLocale.description: ISO language code for the saved reply's content (default `en`).

status.description: Workflow status. `draft` replies are not surfaced in suggestion or quick-pick UIs.

tags.description: Free-form tags attached to the saved reply.

categoryId.description: ID of the SavedReplyCategory grouping this reply, if any.

category.description: The category grouping this saved reply, when assigned.

userId.description: When set, the reply is private to this user (only visible to them via the API).

user.description: The user the saved reply is private to, when applicable.

roles.description: When non-empty, only users whose roles intersect with this list can read the reply. Mutually exclusive with `userId` (when both could be set, `userId` wins for visibility).
